title: Nek's silly mod
description: Adds things like the Jumpblock, Hello Lava Bomb, and so much more!
body:
**A silly mod I made while playing with [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/).** # Includes: ![ls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24b68f6c4dec08706f41fe21d0f78da4d4076907.png) 1. Jumpblock
Makes you shoot to the skies when you stand on it
2. Hello baby
A block that I think makes you go fast and explodes when you right click
3. Lightningsword
Shoots dragon fireballs when you right click
4. Supersheep
A walking sheep
**And so much more!!**
